description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the external template file /.gitlab/ci/templates.gitlab-ci.yml. Define build-and-deploy jobs named debian_packer, distribution_ci_tools, distribution_ci_tools_arm64, rat, ruby_docker and ruby_kaniko that each extend the .build_and_deploy (or .build_and_deploy_arm64) template, inherit its stage (build) and run the predefined shell commands such as the packer build command and Docker/Kaniko push steps. For each of those, add a corresponding test job (debian_packer test, distribution_ci_tools test, distribution_ci_tools_arm64 test, rat test, ruby_docker test, ruby_kaniko test) that extends the .test_build (or .test_build_arm64) template, inherit its test stage and execute the template’s test script (e.g., packer validate and integration test commands). All jobs share the Docker image, services, caches, artifacts and any rules defined in the included templates. The pipeline runs the build jobs first, then the test jobs, and finally any deploy actions defined inside the .build_and_deploy templates.
